# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Completed the pending remediation for Bead 9ni.3.2.2. Milestone show/status/action error mapping now preserves AppError::StaleMilestonePlan unchanged so callers retain structured source run and bundle fields. Milestone controller resume paths now validate the materialized milestone source requirements bundle before completion/execution decisions in both CLI milestone and run controller runtimes, and prepare_milestone_controller_for_execution preserves the structured stale-plan error instead of wrapping it. Added regressions for stale error mapper preservation and stale source rejection before controller resume completion. Verified the existing follow-up bead ralph-burning-epnn remains present for deferred precise per-question invalidation.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the pending amendment sites in src/cli/milestone.rs and src/cli/run.rs and confirmed the stale-plan propagation and controller resume bypasses were the remaining scope.","o
